daily_summary.headline: Exciting SpaceX Launch and Aurora Viewing Opportunity

top_events.title: Falcon 9 Block 5 | Starlink Group 17-17
top_events.description: SpaceX's Falcon 9 Block 5 rocket is set to launch the Starlink Group 17-17 mission, deploying 25 satellites for the Starlink mega-constellation.
top_events.action: Watch live stream for the launch.

top_events.title: Aurora Viewing Opportunity
top_events.description: A G1 geomagnetic storm is expected, offering potential aurora visibility at high latitudes.
top_events.action: Check visibility conditions and prepare for aurora photography.

top_events.title: Kuaizhou 1A | Unknown Payload
top_events.description: The Kuaizhou 1A rocket is scheduled to launch with an unknown payload from Jiuquan Satellite Launch Center.
top_events.action: Follow updates for more information on the payload.

opportunities.recommendation: Possible aurora at high latitudes. Best for northern locations (65°+). Worth checking if conditions are optimal.
